sections.heading: Implementing Loading States
sections.body: Track loading status in your app:

code.explanation: Every async operation should have 3 states: loading (fetching), success (data loaded), error (something failed).
Cache-Control header tells the browser how long to keep resources. Client-side caching prevents redundant API calls.

summary: Track loading/error states for every async operation. Use browser caching headers to speed up repeat visits. Implement skeleton screens for better perceived performance.
